flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Chattahoochee Valley Community College rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.9k → $5.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Chattahoochee Valley Community College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.1k → $9.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Chattahoochee Valley Community College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (60.0% → 52.1%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Chattahoochee Valley Community College rose 150% between 2009 and 2010 (2.8% → 7.0%).
